Home.Introduction: An all-in-one kernel-level system tool with a modern WinUI 3 interface
Task.Title: Task Manager

Disasm.Msg.CapstoneInitFailed: Unable to initialize Capstone! Please check the system configuration! Error code:
Disasm.Msg.InvalidInput: One or more of the values ​​entered are illegal!

Utility.Desc.Card.HVM: Turning on virtualization mode will enhance some functions (only for hardware that supports Intel VT)
Utility.Desc.Card.CreateProcess: Disable or allow global process creation
Utility.Desc.Card.CreateFile: Disable or allow global file creation
Utility.Desc.Card.LoadDrv: Disable or allow the system to load drivers
Utility.Desc.Card.UnloadDrv: Disable or allow the system to uninstall drivers
Utility.Desc.Card.ModifyBootsec: Disable or allow modification of disk boot sector
Utility.Desc.Card.ObjRegCb: Disable or allow registration of object operation callbacks (ObRegisterCallbacks)
Utility.Desc.Card.CmRegCb: Disable or allow registration of registry callbacks (CmRegisterCallbackEx)
Utility.Desc.Card.DSE: Turn Driver Signature Enforcement on or off.
Utility.Desc.Card.LKD: Turn local kernel debugging on or off
Utility.Desc.Card.BSOD: Crash the system (Blue Screen Of Death)
Utility.Msg.SysOpWarning: (Warning: Features in this area may not work properly, resulting in a blue screen or crash is normal!)
Utility.Msg.ActionFailedAlready: Operation failed: Already in this state!
Utility.Msg.ConfirmAction: Are you sure you want to do this? Click again to confirm.
Settings.Header.Card.DisasmCount: Number of displays per line of memory
Settings.Desc.Card.EnumFileMode: API used in file managers to traverse files, NTFSPARSER may not work
Settings.Desc.Card.EnumStrengthen: Forcing to use SKT64 as the driver for task manager enumeration processes may lead to lower efficiency
Settings.Desc.Card.TaskAutoRefresh: Task Manager periodically refreshes the process list to keep the information up-to-date.
Settings.Desc.Card.PDHFirst: Even if NVML is available, the data provided by the system PDH for GPU is still used
Settings.Desc.Card.DisasmCount: The amount of data displayed in each line of the memory disassembly page
Settings.Desc.Card.TrayBgRun: Minimize to tray and run in background when closing window
Settings.Desc.Card.ElevatedRun: Run Starlight GUI with TrustedInstaller permissions
Settings.Desc.Card.AutoStart: By scheduling tasks to start automatically after logging in, you can avoid UAC pop-ups at boot.
Settings.Desc.Card.ReplaceTaskMgr: Take over the startup of the system task manager. When the task manager is opened, it will automatically wake up and jump to the task management page.
Settings.Desc.Card.Background: The type of background color applied
Settings.Desc.Card.ImageBackground: Add a custom image to the background layer
Settings.Desc.Card.ImportImage: Import a picture from your computer as a background
Settings.Desc.Card.ClearImage: Clear the image background that has been set
Settings.Desc.Card.ImageStretch: How to set the size of the image in the background
Settings.Desc.Card.ImageOpacity: The transparency of the image in the background will cover the window color
Settings.Desc.Card.Navigation: Navigation bar position and display style
Settings.Desc.Card.CheckUpdate: Checking for updates every time you start up and keeping getting updates from the network disk can create some revenue for the author.
Settings.Desc.Card.Log: Open or close the log window
Settings.Desc.Card.Fix: If full functionality doesn't load correctly, try running this fix
Settings.Msg.AutoStartEnabled: Auto-start at boot has been turned on and will be started with the highest permissions through scheduled tasks!
Settings.Msg.AutoStartEnableFailed: Failed to create a boot auto-start task, please check the system scheduled task service status!
Settings.Msg.AutoStartDisableFailed: Failed to turn off auto-start at boot, please check permissions or scheduled task service!
Settings.Msg.ReplaceTaskMgrFailed: Failed to set up alternative task manager, please check permissions or system policies!
Help.Text.Stars.Desc: The developer of Starlight GUI, with a passion for programming.
Help.Text.WinUI.Desc: WinUI is a user interface layer containing modern controls and styles for building Windows apps.
Help.Text.WinUIEssentials.Desc: A C++ repository specifically designed to simplify WinUI 3 development.
Help.Text.KALI.Desc: Specializing in kernel development, providing SKT64 driver and AstralX code guidance.
Help.Text.MuLin.Desc: One QA and half a PD? Some minor bugs and minor requirements were raised for this project.
Help.Text.Wormwaker.Desc: Technical support, publicity, and idea guidance for this project, and a master developer at the Windows user level.
Help.Text.SponsorIntro: Here are everyone who has supported Starlight GUI since day one, in no particular order. Huge thanks for cheering on the app and its development!
ProcHandle.Title: handle
ProcHandle.Msg.NoInfo: Unable to obtain handle information for this process!
ProcHandle.Msg.TooManyHandles: The number of handles is too large, the result may be inaccurate!
ProcKCT.Title: Kernel callback table
ProcKCT.Msg.NoInfo: Unable to obtain kernel callback information for this process!
ProcKCT.Msg.TooManyRecords: The result may be inaccurate if there are too many records!
ProcModule.Title: module
ProcModule.Msg.NoInfo: Unable to obtain module information for this process!
ProcModule.Msg.TooManyModules: There are too many modules, and the result may be inaccurate!
ProcThread.Title: thread
ProcThread.Msg.MurderWarning: This is a dangerous operation! Click again to confirm!
RunProcess.Title: Run new process
RunProcess.Desc: Starlight GUI will open the corresponding program based on the name you type.
InjectDLL.Title: Inject DLL
InjectDLL.Desc: Starlight GUI will inject files into the specified process based on the selected DLL file path.
LoadDriver.Title: Load driver
LoadDriver.Desc: Starlight GUI will load the target driver file into the system according to the selected driver file path.
LoadDriver.Msg.NotSYS: File is not of type SYS!
ModifyToken.Title: Modify process token
ModifyToken.Desc: Starlight GUI will modify the token of the specified process to the selected permission type.
CopyFile.Title: Copy files
CopyFile.Desc: Starlight GUI will copy the selected files/folders to the specified path.
Update.Text.NewVersionAvailable: Detected new version of Starlight GUI available!
Update.Text.Desc: You can open the download page directly from this dialog, or simply skip the update.
Update.Text.Tip: Tips: You can modify whether to detect updates in the settings
Update.Text.QuarkCode: Quark network disk extraction code: vVmj
Update.Text.NoDirectLink: This software relies on network disk transfer and new additions to obtain some revenue, so it does not provide direct downloads, please understand!
